tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a slightly low total cholesterol, which is not clinically concerning in isolation, especially in an elderly patient. Glycemic, renal, electrolyte, and lipid parameters are stable. No evidence of acute or chronic metabolic or renal dysfunction. No laboratory indication for immediate intervention.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
